evidence: "This movie is graet, I had no high expectations for this but left with high hopes for the next Movie."
"This Anime is great but incomplete there are three chapters that would close out everything missing."
"The only problem in that they left out two time line theories..."
"I gave this three stares because it is good, the problem is unless you have read the book you will be lost."
"The Move started out slow and a little Iffy..."
"This is not bad at all and well written and made, I like the twist an turns that happen."
"the acting is good, (on the male lead side the kid so-so) the images for the dinosaurs look good not the best but good..."
"The FX's still hold up today and the story is timeless."
"Jim karry play Doctor Egg-man aka Robotnic perfic and the voice acter form sonic sounds spot on."
"this movie has great visuals an the way the sound is used is mind opening."
"The movie is good with a lot of detail put in to the set design..."
"I was waiting for this to be just another bad movie but it turned out to be really good like to first."
"I like this movie for the story and the Transformation seen."

summary: The user enjoys action and adventure genres, particularly in movies and anime, appreciating good visuals and sound. They have mixed feelings about narrative complexity and pacing, indicating a preference for engaging stories but with some reservations about execution.
